title: Online Business Manager
required_skills: Proven experience in business management or similar role
Ability to translate strategic goals into actionable plans
Strong analytical skills for data-driven decision-making
Familiarity with AI tools for business optimization
Ability to manage multiple priorities simultaneously
Self-motivated with minimal need for direction
bonus_skills: Data analysis and performance metrics evaluation
missing_skills: Self-directed remote work in VA/OBM context
core_responsibilities: Translate revenue goals into clear weekly and monthly priorities focused on high-impact growth
Build and manage a project management system to track tasks, deadlines, and business priorities
Oversee day-to-day business operations with minimal direction
Identify and pitch opportunities for podcasts, speaking engagements, and partnerships
Analyze performance data and metrics to guide decision-making and optimize business strategies
recommended_emphasis: Project management experience (Scrum, SAFe) and coordination of cross-functional priorities
Data analysis and KPI tracking applied to business performance optimization
Autonomy and self-direction in international/remote work settings
Go-to-market strategy and revenue-goal translation into actionable plans
